title: Retrograde Labeling of BAT-Projecting Sympathetic Neurons with CTB
author: Seoeun Lee
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wjrfcm6

steps.title: Anesthetize the animal with isoflurane, and...
steps.instruction: Anesthetize the animal with isoflurane, and keep it anesthetized for the whole procedure

steps.title: Once animal is unconscious (check with...
steps.instruction: Once animal is unconscious (check with toe pinch), place it on heating pad and lubricate the eyes with ophthalamic ointment

steps.title: Inject buprenorphine (100 µl/ 10 µg)...
steps.instruction: Inject buprenorphine (100 µl/ 10 µg) on the surgical site for analgesia

steps.title: Remove the hair of interscapular region
steps.instruction: Remove the hair of interscapular region

steps.title: Scrub the surgical area using povidone-iodine...
steps.instruction: Scrub the surgical area using povidone-iodine and 70% isopropyl alcohol, 3 times each

steps.title: Open the sterilized pouch with tools,...
steps.instruction: Open the sterilized pouch with tools, put the suture on the sterile space (save the plastic cover for CTB drops), uncover the sterile draping, place on the sterile space

steps.title: Prepare CTB in syringe (10 ul...
steps.instruction: Prepare CTB in syringe (10 ul for each depot), put on sterile gloves *Alternatively, 1-2 ul of less volume can be injected using Hamilton syringe or mouth pipette with a pulled glass needle

steps.title: Cut the sterile draping to make...
steps.instruction: Cut the sterile draping to make a hole that has a size of the operating site

steps.title: Make a shallow incision at the...
steps.instruction: Make a shallow incision at the center of the shaved area (1 cm below the head) and extend about 0.5 cm bilaterally

steps.title: Grasp the adipose tissue of one...
steps.instruction: Grasp the adipose tissue of one side, locate BAT inside and inject the CTB solution

steps.title: Repeat the same injection on the...
steps.instruction: Repeat the same injection on the opposite side to complete the bilateral injection

steps.title: Gently put back the fat pad...
steps.instruction: Gently put back the fat pad and close the wound with a 4-0 PS-4 suture

steps.title: Wipe the closed surgical wound with Povidone-iodine and alcohol prep
steps.instruction: Wipe the closed surgical wound with Povidone-iodine and alcohol prep

steps.title: Inject buprenorphine or appropriate analgesics every...
steps.instruction: Inject buprenorphine or appropriate analgesics every 4-12 hours after thesurgery for 48 hours

steps.title: Sacrifice the animals 3 days after...
steps.instruction: Sacrifice the animals 3 days after the injection, dissect out stellate ganglia (SG) on a slide with cold PBS

steps.title: Dilute CTB in saline to make 1% stock solution
steps.instruction: Dilute CTB in saline to make 1% stock solution: 500 ug CTB powder in 50 ul saline

steps.title: Aliquot 4 ul of 1% CTB...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 4 ul of 1% CTB solution to each bottle and store it at -20ºC

steps.title: When ready to use, take out...
steps.instruction: When ready to use, take out the frozen CTB solution and adjust with more saline to final volume desired (ex. add 16 ul of saline each bottle to get 20 ul of total solution, which will be injected 10 ul to each depot)

steps.title: Fix the dissected SG in 4% PFA in 0
steps.instruction: Fix the dissected SG in 4% PFA in 0.1M PB for 1 hour and wash with PBS overnight at 4ºC

steps.title: Attach an iSpacer on a slide...
steps.instruction: Attach an iSpacer on a slide glass, carefully locate the SG inside the spacer (best to stretch SG horizontally for imaging) and mount with Vectashield (~110 ul) and a cover slip

steps.title: SG was imaged with Zeiss confocal...
steps.instruction: SG was imaged with Zeiss confocal 710 using tile scan and z-stack options.
